generated_oml:
instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensor for internal temperature monitoring with ±0.5°C accuracy, sampling at 1 Hz via 1-Wire protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensor for internal temperature monitoring with ±0.5°C accuracy, sampling at 1 Hz via 1-Wire protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External temperature sensor for ambient conditions monitoring with 1 Hz sampling rate"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data collected from DS18S20 sensors for thermal monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance StructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric CAD model representing structural properties of automobile chassis and body structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance DynamicBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model defined by differential equations for dynamic behavior of automobile components under mechanical forces"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQCommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between sensors, controllers, and Digital Twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService
]

instance RaspberryPiControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi hardware for data acquisition and control of physical actuators"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, OptimizationService
]

instance ScipyCalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for parameter optimization and calibration algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService, FaultDetectionService, OptimizationService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system safety and operational optimality using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OptimalPerformanceInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation of Physical Twin behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Algorithmic optimization of system parameters for performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedParameterInsight, AdjustHeatbedTemperatureAction, AdjustFanSpeedAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detection of faults and anomalies in system operation using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimation of system states using Kalman filters or other state estimation techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimateInsight
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indication of safety violations detected by real-time monitors"
]

instance OptimalPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of optimal performance metrics for system operation"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from predictive simulations of Physical Twin behavior"
]

instance OptimizedParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized parameter values generated by optimization algorithms"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of faults or anomalies in system components"
]

instance StateEstimateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the system derived from sensor data and models"
]

instance AdjustHeatbedTemperatureAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of heatbed temperature to maintain safe operating range"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of fan speed for optimal airflow distribution"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Wheels : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Automobile wheel component part of the Physical Twin"
]

instance Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Automobile chassis component part of the Physical Twin"
]

instance BodyStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Automobile body structure component part of the Physical Twin"
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for thermal regulation of the content within the automobile system"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for airflow distribution within the automobile system"
]

instance ControllerInterface : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller interface that communicates with Digital Twin to execute actuation commands"
]

instance AutomobileSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Wheels, Chassis, BodyStructure, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, ControllerInterface, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Raspberry Pi controller subscribes to RabbitMQ for fan and heatbed control commands, executing actions such as issuing a heating signal to activate the heatbed upon receipt."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server was deployed for synchronization and communication between physical and digital components; the low-level driver periodically reads temperature data from the physical twin. Specific synchronization intervals and latency requirements are not specified."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The software setup includes a controller, a low-level driver, and a communication server (RabbitMQ), with Figure 7 illustrating the communication flow between these components and the physical incubator system for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update cyber-physical system models with parameter estimates derived from sensor data to minimize residual error, while monitoring systems validate safety and optimality against predefined criteria, triggering human or algorithmic interventions upon violation detection."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ handles synchronization and communication, with sensors connected via 1-Wire bus and Raspberry Pi utilizing built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth for network connectivity."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B edge device, hosting both the RabbitMQ server and controller software."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring mechanisms within the Digital Twin assess the Physical Twin's safety compliance and operational optimality; upon detection of safety violations, corrective actions are initiated by human operators or autonomous algorithms to modify the Physical Twin's state."
]
